did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a systematic review that evaluates and compares existing AI/ML methods (such as SVM, ResNet-50, CNNs) and their performance metrics from other studies. It does not present new experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML models to dermatology data itself, but rather synthesizes findings from prior literature.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
